text:
EXPLANATION: The cited source refers to the open-source repository and project page for the Seed-OSS models developed by ByteDance. The discrepancy in the author name is a minor formatting difference between the cited "ByteDance Seed Team" and the repository name "ByteDance-Seed", which refers to the same entity.
LINK: https://github.com/ByteDance-Seed/seed-oss
FOUND_TITLE: Seed-OSS
FOUND_AUTHORS: ByteDance-Seed
FOUND_YEAR: 2025
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
